title: The Inflammable Substances Act, 1952
full_text: The Inflammable Substances Act, 1952 ज्वलनशील पदार्थ अधिनियम, 1952 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 1952-20 Act Number: 20 Enactment Date: 1952-03-06 Act Year: 1952 Short Title: The Inflammable Substances Act, 1952 Hindi Title: ज्वलनशील पदार्थ अधिनियम, 1952 Long Title: An Act to declare certain substances to be dangerously inflammable and to provide for the regulation of their import, transport, storage and production by applying thereto the Petroleum Act, 1934, and the rules thereunder, and for certain matters connected with such regulation. Ministry: Ministry of Commerce and Industry Department: Department of Promotion of Industry and Internal Trade Enforcement Date: 06-03-1952 TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles The Inflammable Substances Act, 1952 Show all section Section 1. Short title. Section 2. Definitions. Section 3. Declaration of certain substances to be dangerously inflammable. Section 4. Power to apply Petroleum Act to dangerously inflammable substances. Show Related Subordinates Section 5. Operation of certain notifications and rules. Section 6. Validation of certain acts and indemnity in respect thereof. Section 7. Repealed.
